languages.text: Лорд-капитан сокрушил{mf||а} железных мертвецов. Здесь, среди обломков, когда-то сгинул Себериан — существует ли награда достойнее утраченного клинка-реликвии?

traits.locale_text: [ДРАФТ]Вы устранили угрозу железных мервтецов и оказались в их руинах, откуда они пришли. Тех самых, где сгинул Себериан и которые вы приказали раскопать. Так закончите начатое и верните останки легендарного предка в династическую крипту. Пусть воссоединится с семьей.

languages.text: The Lord Captain has crushed the iron dead. Seberian once perished among these very ruins — what greater reward could there be than the recovery of the long-lost relic blade?
languages.original_text: Лорд-капитан сокрушил{mf||а} железных мертвецов. Здесь, среди обломков, когда-то сгинул Себериан — существует ли награда достойнее утраченного клинка-реликвии?

traits.locale_text: The Lord Captain has crushed the iron dead. Seberian once perished among these very ruins — what greater reward could there be than the recovery of the long-lost relic blade?
The Lord Captain has crushed the iron dead. Seberian once perished among these very ruins — what greater reward could there be than the recovery of the long-lost relic blade?
The Lord Captain has crushed the iron dead. Seberian once perished among these very ruins — what greater reward could there be than the recovery of the long-lost relic blade?
The Lord Captain has crushed the iron dead. Seberian once perished among these very ruins — what greater reward could there be than the recovery of the long-lost relic blade?

languages.text: Der Lord Captain hat die eisernen Toten zerschmettert. Seberian ist einst in diesen Ruinen gestorben ... welchen größeren Lohn als die Bergung der lange verlorenen Ehrenklinge könnte es geben?
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has crushed the iron dead. Seberian once perished among these very ruins — what greater reward could there be than the recovery of the long-lost relic blade?

traits.locale_text: Der Lord Captain hat die eisernen Toten zerschmettert. Seberian ist einst in diesen Ruinen gestorben ... welchen größeren Lohn als die Bergung der lange verlorenen Ehrenklinge könnte es geben?

languages.text: {mf|Le seigneur-capitaine|La seigneure-capitaine} a anéanti les morts de fer. Autrefois, Seberian a trouvé la mort dans ces ruines. Quelle plus grande récompense y aurait-il qu'une ancienne relique perdue ?
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has crushed the iron dead. Seberian once perished among these very ruins — what greater reward could there be than the recovery of the long-lost relic blade?

traits.locale_text: {mf|Le seigneur-capitaine|La seigneure-capitaine} a anéanti les morts de fer. Autrefois, Seberian a trouvé la mort dans ces ruines. Quelle plus grande récompense y aurait-il qu'une ancienne relique perdue ?

languages.text: 舰长大人已经碾碎了那些铁块死人。塞贝里安当年就是在这片遗迹中殒命的——还有什么奖励能比找回那把失落已久的圣剑更丰厚呢？
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has crushed the iron dead. Seberian once perished among these very ruins — what greater reward could there be than the recovery of the long-lost relic blade?

traits.locale_text: 舰长大人已经碾碎了那些铁块死人。塞贝里安当年就是在这片遗迹中殒命的——还有什么奖励能比找回那把失落已久的圣剑更丰厚呢？

languages.text: {mf|El|La} Lord Capitán ha aplastado a los muertos metálicos. Seberian encontró su fin en estas mismas ruinas, ¿qué mayor recompensa podría haber que recuperar el filo reliquia perdido hace tanto tiempo?
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has crushed the iron dead. Seberian once perished among these very ruins — what greater reward could there be than the recovery of the long-lost relic blade?

traits.locale_text: {mf|El|La} Lord Capitán ha aplastado a los muertos metálicos. Seberian encontró su fin en estas mismas ruinas, ¿qué mayor recompensa podría haber que recuperar el filo reliquia perdido hace tanto tiempo?

languages.text: ロード・キャプテンは鉄の死者を粉砕した。この残骸の中で、セベリアンはかつて死んだのだ。失われた遺物の刃より価値のある報酬があるだろうか？
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain crushed the iron dead. Here, among the wreckage, Seberian once perished — is there a reward more worthy than a lost relic blade?

languages.text: Lord Kaptan, demir ölüleri ezdi geçti. Seberian bir zamanlar tam da bu harabelerin arasında yok olmuştu... Uzun zamandır kayıp olan yadigâr kılıcı bulmaktan daha büyük bir ödül olabilir mi?
languages.original_text: The Lord Captain has crushed the iron dead. Seberian once perished among these very ruins — what greater reward could there be than the recovery of the long-lost relic blade?

traits.locale_text: Lord Kaptan, demir ölüleri ezdi geçti. Seberian bir zamanlar tam da bu harabelerin arasında yok olmuştu... Uzun zamandır kayıp olan yadigâr kılıcı bulmaktan daha büyük bir ödül olabilir mi?
